compliance.assurance_rationale: FedRAMP Rev.5 Baselines AC-2 Account management — firewall/policy change audit records the rule and access changes AC-2 expects.
SWIFT CSP CSCF v2025 1.1 SWIFT environment protection — firewall policy change audit evidences the SWIFT environment-protection control.
UK Cyber Essentials Montpellier CE.BF.1 Boundary firewalls — policy change audit captures the updated boundary-firewall documentation mandate.
